schema.name: string - file or folder name
schema.content_key: string|null - key to look up content in another JSON

children.name: Q4 Status Report.doc
children.content:
Q4 Survey Status Report

Prepared by: Lisa Milavic

Date: December 20, 1999

The Q4 consumer confidence survey is progressing on schedule. We have completed 847 out of 1,200 targeted interviews.

Key Metrics

  • Response rate: 34.2%
  • Average interview length: 18.4 minutes
  • Refusal rate: 12.1%

No significant issues to report. Training compliance remains at 100%.

children.name: Interview Notes.txt
children.content:
Interview Notes - December 1999
================================

Respondent #0847 - Very cooperative, completed full survey.
Noted some hesitation on health questions (Q14-Q18).
Said 'everyone at work has been getting headaches lately.'

Respondent #0848 - Refused to continue after Q22.
Said the questions were 'too personal.'
Scheduled callback for 12/27.

Respondent #0849 - Completed. No issues.
Mentioned Y2K concerns unprompted during Q31.

-- L.W.

children.name: Holiday Party Notes.doc
children.content:
Holiday Party Planning

Date: Friday, December 17th

Location: Conference Room B, 14th Floor

To-Do

  • Order cake from Veniero's (chocolate, serves 30)
  • Buy paper plates and napkins
  • Print Secret Santa assignments
  • Ask Dave about the playlist

Note: Building management says we need to be out by 8 PM. Elevators shut down at 9.

children.name: Resume Draft.doc
children.content:
Lisa Milavic

142 Main Street, Apt 3B
Roosevelt Island, NY 10044
(212) 555-0147

Objective

Experienced survey research professional seeking senior CATI supervisor position.

Experience

CalCom Research Services -- CATI Interviewer/Supervisor
March 1997 - Present

  • Conduct computer-assisted telephone interviews for market research studies
  • Train and supervise team of 6 junior interviewers
  • Maintain 98.2% quality compliance rating
  • Manage call scheduling and quota fulfillment

DataLine Associates -- Phone Surveyor
June 1995 - February 1997

  • Completed 200+ surveys monthly across multiple studies
  • Achieved highest completion rate in department (Q3 1996)
